summary:
我先把这条简短说明补成正式答复并写进用户可见线程，确保当前阶段和最新结论说清楚。
我当前在做的是，把已经验证过的视频压缩主线继续收紧成一个能被下游模型直接消费的接口，而不是再回头重做旧的压缩方案比较。从 big picture 看，这个项目已经从“证明 machine-oriented video compression 可行”，推进到“把压缩表示接成一个完整、可复现、可被 foundation model 使用的 pipeline，并判断这条路值不值得继续放大”。目前最新的结论是：最值得继续推进的方向已经收敛到 `querybank-normalized teacher-anchor packet interface`，而当前真正的主要瓶颈不是单纯训练不够，而是 retrieval 表征里的 hubness / collapse，所以接下来重点会放在接口稳定性和表示去塌缩，而不是盲目加大训练。

guidance_vm.summary: Main run recorded. Interpret it against baseline before spending more compute.
guidance_vm.why_now: A run result only changes the quest once its metrics, caveats, and branch value are turned into a durable decision.
complete_when: A report or decision explains the result versus baseline.
The next route is chosen: analysis, write, branch, or stop.

alternative_routes.label: Launch analysis
alternative_routes.when: The result is promising but still under-explained.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Strengthens understanding, but adds additional runs.

alternative_routes.label: Move to writing
alternative_routes.when: The result is already strong and well-explained enough.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Faster paper progress, but less stress-testing.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.record(kind='report', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Summarize the main run and metric deltas.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.record(kind='decision', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Choose the next route based on the result.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.create_analysis_campaign(...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: When extra experiments are needed, create them as one-slice or multi-slice child branches from the current result node.
